critic_raw:
Issue 1: Weather regime mismatch — different weather difficulty across evaluation windows.
Issue 2: Outage regime difference — 23 vs 7 unplanned outages changes forecasting difficulty.
Issue 3: Forecast cutoff mismatch — incumbent at 16:00 prior day, challenger at 06:00 current day.
defender_raw: Concede all three issues. Same-date bakeoff with normalized cutoffs is required before vendor selection.
adjudication_raw: Round 1: All 3 conceded. Round 2 (forced): no new arguments. Hollow. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

empirical_test.condition: Same-date rolling-origin bakeoff with normalized cutoff and identical outage treatment
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: MAPE edge shrinks below 0.2 or reverses in major regimes
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Challenger leads by at least 0.7 MAPE points overall and within major weather regimes
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Challenger wins overall but edge disappears with normalized cutoff
